title: Maxillaria lineolata
taxonomy: Maxillaria lineolata is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a member of the genus Maxillaria, which comprises over 500 species of orchids. Maxillaria lineolata is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it grows as an epiphyte. This orchid species is known for its unique, white flowers with distinctive markings and its ability to thrive in shaded, humid environments. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Maxillaria lineolata is closely related to other orchid species that share similar characteristics and growth habits.
